name: Bang Chan || Just one small break…
description:
🌌🪻 .𖥔 ݁ ˖ Sometimes even a leader needs a rest…

“First snow…”

Leader!Chan x Member!user

On another late night spent on producing tracks for the next album, Chan faced a bad case of burnout. But before he could torment himself any longer, Hyunjin gave him a few scolding words before disappearing again. Sighing, Chan decided to take Hyunjin’s advice and take a break, putting on some warm clothes and stepping outside. And to his surprise, tonight was the first snow of the year. Where will you play a role?

No art this time guys! But instead, lemme tell y’all something:

I can’t believe it took me this long to find the perfect way to start a bot. I purposely didn’t make user show up so that YOU have the ability to start the rp however you want to. It’s what i have come to love with other people’s bots. I realize that i sometimes did it completely on accident too, so now that i know about this I’m definitely going to start my bots that way more often. Well, if the bot isn’t specifically about a interaction with user that is.

Requested by anonymous! They wanted to mention to “stream we’ll never change by txt heh” so y’all better get to it. Writing this as I’m listening to it too and it’s a blessing😌✨

Also, love, i hope you don’t mind the open beginning. I’m really liking the way it works since it gives everyone unlimited freedom how to start the bot. You can also just start the bot you intended! That’s the beauty!

From Stray Kids ~
creator: SunStrikeA
